claims.quote: For more than 50 years, in collaboration with several clinical and community partners, UCSF Fresno has offered medical education and training for residents, fellows and students.

claims.quote: The Acute Care Surgery Fellowship encompasses both trauma and non-trauma surgical emergencies, as well as surgical critical care.
claims.claimText: Acute Care Surgery Fellowship offered at UCSF Fresno.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Subspecialty fellowship — Tier 2.

claims.quote: The UCSF Fresno Advanced Cardiovascular Imaging Fellowship Program is a one-year non-ACGME fellowship training opportunity for physicians who have interest and qualifications to pursue highly specialized training in advanced cardiovascular imaging.
claims.claimText: Advanced Cardiovascular Imaging Fellowship — one-year non-ACGME.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship for trained physicians — Tier 2.

claims.quote: The UCSF Fresno Endocrinology, Diabetes and Metabolism Fellowship is a new, two-year program that is accredited by the ACGME.
claims.claimText: Endocrinology, Diabetes and Metabolism Fellowship — two-year ACGME-accredited.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: ACGME fellowship — Tier 2.

claims.quote: Our three-year ACGME-accredited Pulmonary Disease/Critical Care Fellowship Program welcomed its first class in 2007.
claims.claimText: Pulmonary Disease/Critical Care Fellowship — three-year ACGME-accredited.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: ACGME fellowship — Tier 2.

claims.quote: The UCSF Fresno Sleep Medicine Fellowship is a one-year program and is accredited by the Accreditation Council for Graduate Medical Education.
claims.claimText: Sleep Medicine Fellowship — one-year ACGME-accredited.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: ACGME fellowship — Tier 2.

claims.quote: The Surgical Critical Care Fellowship program is an ACGME/RRC accredited training program, offered through the University of San Francisco Fresno, Department of Surgery.
claims.claimText: Surgical Critical Care Fellowship — ACGME/RRC accredited.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: ACGME fellowship — Tier 2.

claims.quote: The Emergency Medicine Physician Assistant (PA) Residency program is an 18 month postgraduate program that accepts two PA trainees per year.
claims.claimText: Emergency Medicine Physician Assistant Residency — 18-month postgraduate program.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: PA postgraduate residency — Tier 2 trainee.

claims.quote: The UCSF Fresno Acute Care/Trauma Surgery Physician Assistant (PA) Residency Program affiliated with the UCSF School of Medicine is offering a twelve-month surgical residency program that provides intense training in the perioperative and operative management of patients.
claims.claimText: Acute Care/Trauma Surgery PA Residency — 12-month program.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: PA postgraduate residency — Tier 2.

claims.quote: Affiliated with the University of California, San Francisco (UCSF) School of Medicine, we offer a 12 month postgraduate program for 2 PA orthopedic surgery residents per year.
claims.claimText: Orthopaedic Surgery PA Residency — 12-month postgraduate program, 2 residents/year.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: PA postgraduate residency — Tier 2.
